channel.title: Hand Pose Estimation on Lu Xu
channel.description: Recent content in Hand Pose Estimation on Lu Xu

item.title: Regression Network for Hand Pose Estimation with Auxiliary Variable for Structured-Output
item.description: The regression based deep networks have achieved the state-of-the-arts performance on 3D hand pose estimation tasks. However, the challenges are still remains, such as how to learn the high-dimensional mapping between features and pose joints while following the kinematics of human hands. This work focuses on this problem and proposes an novel algorithm inspired by the distribution modeling ability of Variational Autoencoders.
